description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a predominantly flat roof and a striking black-and-white striped exterior. The structure is composed of several interlocking rectangular volumes, with the main building mass set back from a smaller, green-accented section that appears to serve as an entry or garden area. The facade includes a mix of solid walls and narrow, horizontal window bands, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The property is bordered by a wide, striped pavement or platform, enhancing its visual impact and providing a clear boundary. The roof is mostly flat, with a small raised section and a visible rooftop access or utility structure. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, black-and-white striped exterior, and minimalist geometric design. Features include narrow windows, a green-accented entry area, and a wide striped platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry area with green accents, horizontal window bands, and the striped platform leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the setback of the main building mass, and the continuation of the striped platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wall with minimal window openings and the raised rooftop section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the boxy volumes, vertical stripes, and the overall geometric composition.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entry with green accent, flat steps, and no porch or decorative columns
